message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Admin" as Admin
rectangle "Employees Module" as EmployeesModule
database "Search Index" as SearchIndex
database "Database" as Database

activate EmployeesModule
Admin -> EmployeesModule : trigger task
activate EmployeesModule

EmployeesModule -> SearchIndex : reset index (delete + create)
activate SearchIndex
deactivate SearchIndex

EmployeesModule -> Database : stream all employees
activate Database

loop
  EmployeesModule -> SearchIndex : index employee
  activate SearchIndex
  deactivate SearchIndex
end

Database --> EmployeesModule
deactivate Database

EmployeesModule --> Admin
deactivate EmployeesModule

@enduml
